use_cases: Display rotating customer testimonials with circular navigation controls
Showcase social proof with autoplay testimonials on landing pages
Present user reviews in a visually engaging carousel format
ai_summary: A circular testimonials carousel component with navigation arrows, autoplay functionality, and customizable colors and fonts. Features smooth animations via Framer Motion, hover interactions on controls, and responsive gap calculations. Designed to showcase customer testimonials with name, designation, quote, and profile image in a modern minimalist dark-themed presentation.
